draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Ashwin Patel as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management for cybersecurity. As the CEO of Innovation Hub, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Patel and witnessing firsthand his remarkable expertise and contributions to the field.

Innovation Hub is a leading global product acceleration platform that helps over 500,000 product managers and leaders build great products. Our organization is dedicated to advancing the careers of product managers and fostering innovation in product management. We provide a range of resources, including award-winning podcasts, popular newsletters, and webinars, to support product professionals in their growth and development. Additionally, we act as trusted advisors to Chief Product Officers (CPOs) at Fortune 1000 companies, helping them build competitive product teams and accelerate their careers.

Our platform publishes insights from innovative companies like TechFuture, Wealthify, and AmplifyTech, and recognizes excellence in product management through our annual awards. Innovation Hub is committed to sharing best practices and fostering a community of product leaders who are driving the future of product management.

As the CEO of Innovation Hub, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Ashwin Patel and witnessing firsthand his remarkable expertise and contributions to the field. Mr. Patel serves as the Head of the Boston Chapter for Innovation Hub, a role that is both highly selective and prestigious. He was invited to lead the Boston Chapter following the retirement of the previous head, who was the SVP of Product at NovaTrust. This invitation was extended to Mr. Patel based on his significant expertise, reputation, and prior involvement with our organization.

As the Head of the Boston Chapter, Mr. Patel is responsible for engaging with local speakers, organizing regional product management-focused meetups, and hosting a monthly webinar series. His role is crucial in bringing the benefits of Innovation Hub to the Boston community, helping local product managers accelerate their careers and improve their skills. Mr. Patel's leadership in this role demonstrates his deep commitment to the field of product management and his ability to foster a vibrant community of professionals.

Mr. Patel's invitation to lead the Boston Chapter is a testament to his outstanding achievements and contributions to the field of product management. His extensive experience, particularly in the domain of cybersecurity, makes him an invaluable asset to our organization and the broader product management community.

Mr. Patel's expertise in product management, particularly in the domain of cybersecurity, is both extensive and impressive. With over 15 years of experience in the field, he has built a remarkable career characterized by significant contributions and accomplishments. His deep understanding of cybersecurity and his ability to translate complex technical concepts into effective product strategies have made him a highly respected figure in the industry.

Currently, Mr. Patel serves as the Director of Product Management at Guardian Cyber, a cybersecurity firm with a $100M ARR. In this role, he leads the product management team responsible for the Guardian Managed Cybersecurity Platform, which includes all product platform aspects, UI, core services, growth initiatives, developer experience, and the in-house SOC platform. His leadership and strategic vision have been instrumental in the development and success of this comprehensive security solution, which combines endpoint detection, identity protection, SIEM, and security training to protect American businesses.

Prior to his current role, Mr. Patel held several key positions at notable technology companies. At SecureLab, he served as the Director of Product Management for Security Insights and AI/ML Threat Detection, where he developed cloud security platforms using AI and ML for emerging threat detection. His work at SecureLab demonstrated his ability to harness cutting-edge technologies to address evolving cybersecurity challenges.

At CyberSafe, Mr. Patel was a Principal Product Manager and later a Senior Product Manager, where he led product initiatives for next-generation Managed Detection and Response (MDR) offerings and managed the CyberSafe Central cybersecurity platform. His contributions to CyberSafe included launching a new user and service identity platform used by millions of users and endpoints, as well as developing platform services utilized by every CyberSafe product.

Mr. Patel's tenure at AuthGuard Corporation as the Senior Director of Product Management focused on next-generation identity solutions with zero-trust and AI-backed continuous authentication. His leadership in integrating an M&A acquisition into the AuthGuard IAM platform showcased his ability to drive complex projects to successful completion.

Earlier in his career, Mr. Patel served as the Director of Product Management at SecuraCom, where he launched identity management products for the IoT and DevOps markets. His efforts in achieving $1M ARR within 12 months of launch and building both PM and PMM teams highlighted his entrepreneurial spirit and capability to lead innovative product development.

Mr. Patel's educational background further complements his professional experience. He holds a Master of Science in Computer Science from the University of Western California and a Master of Science in Engineering Management from Marshall University. His technical expertise is supported by a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering from the University of Chennai.

In addition to his formal education, Mr. Patel has filed several patents in the domain of cybersecurity investigations and SOC alerting workflows, demonstrating his commitment to advancing the field of cybersecurity through innovation and thought leadership.

Mr. Patel's extensive experience, proven track record of success in scaling products and teams, and his ability to drive innovation in cybersecurity make him an invaluable asset to any organization. His leadership, strategic vision, and technical expertise have consistently delivered significant results, and his contributions to the field of cybersecurity continue to make a profound impact.

In conclusion, Mr. Ashwin Patel is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management for cybersecurity. His extensive experience, proven track record of success in scaling products and teams, and his ability to drive innovation in cybersecurity make him an invaluable asset to any organization. His leadership, strategic vision, and technical expertise have consistently delivered significant results, and his contributions to the field of cybersecurity continue to make a profound impact.

If you require any further information or clarification, please feel free to contact me.

Sincerely,

Bella Raj

CEOInnovation Hub[email contact here]
final:
Dear reviewing Officer:

This letter is written to serve as a recommendation for Mr. Ashwin Patel, an outstanding individual who has made groundbreaking contributions in the realms of product management for cybersecurity. With a career spanning over 15 years, Mr. Patel has consistently demonstrated leadership and innovation, carving a niche for himself as an expert in the field. His ability to translate complex technical concepts into effective product strategies has established him as a highly respected figure in the industry.

By way of background, I am the CEO of Innovation Hub, a leading global product acceleration platform that helps over 500,000 product managers and leaders build great products. Our organization is dedicated to advancing the careers of product managers and fostering innovation in product management. We offer a plethora of resources, including award-winning podcasts, popular newsletters, and insightful webinars, aimed at supporting product professionals as they grow and develop. As trusted advisors to Chief Product Officers (CPOs) at Fortune 1000 companies, we play a pivotal role in building competitive product teams and accelerating careers. Our platform is also known for publishing insights from pioneering companies like TechFuture, Wealthify, and AmplifyTech, and recognizing excellence in product management through our annual awards. Innovation Hub is committed to sharing best practices and fostering a community of product leaders who are steering the future of product management.

As the CEO of Innovation Hub, I have had the honor of observing Mr. Ashwin Patel’s exceptional contributions and expertise in the realm of product management. Mr. Patel holds the prestigious position of Head of the Boston Chapter for Innovation Hub, a role that exemplifies both selectivity and esteem. His appointment to this role, following the retirement of our previous chapter head, the SVP of Product at NovaTrust, was a testament to Mr. Patel’s profound expertise, sterling reputation, and prior engagement with our organization.

To attain a leadership role such as Head of Chapter, one must be invited—a process that underscores the exclusivity and high standards of our organization. This invitation is extended to those who exhibit unparalleled expertise and leadership in product management. Mr. Patel’s appointment was a direct result of his significant contributions and his status as a recognized leader in the field.

In his capacity as Head of the Boston Chapter, Mr. Patel is instrumental in liaising with local speakers, facilitating regional product management meetups, and conducting monthly webinar series. These activities play a critical role in delivering the advantages of Innovation Hub to the Boston area, empowering local product managers to advance their careers and hone their skills. His leadership in these endeavors not only underscores his dedication to the field but also his aptitude for creating and nurturing a thriving community of product professionals.

Mr. Patel’s invitation to lead the chapter is a clear acknowledgment of his remarkable achievements and substantial influence in product management, particularly within cybersecurity. His extensive experience and insights are invaluable assets to both our organization and the broader community of product managers.

Currently, Mr. Patel serves as the Director of Product Management at Guardian Cyber, a leading cybersecurity firm with a $100 million Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). In this critical role, he leads the product management team for the Guardian Managed Cybersecurity Platform. He is responsible for all aspects of the product platform, including user interface design, core services, strategic growth initiatives, developer experience, and the in-house Security Operations Center (SOC) platform. His leadership and strategic vision have been pivotal in the development and success of this comprehensive security solution, which integrates endpoint detection, identity protection, Security Information and Event Management (SIEM), and security training to safeguard American businesses.

Before his current role, Mr. Patel held significant positions at several notable technology companies. At SecureLab, he served as the Director of Product Management for Security Insights and AI/ML Threat Detection. Here, he was instrumental in developing cloud security platforms that leveraged Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) for detecting emerging threats. His role at SecureLab underscored his ability to implement cutting-edge technologies to tackle evolving cybersecurity challenges effectively.

At CyberSafe, Mr. Patel held the roles of Principal Product Manager and later, Senior Product Manager. He led product initiatives for next-generation Managed Detection and Response (MDR) offerings and managed the CyberSafe Central cybersecurity platform. His major contributions included launching a new user and service identity platform, which was adopted by millions of users and endpoints, and developing critical platform services that were integrated into every CyberSafe product, thereby enhancing the company's overall product ecosystem.

Earlier in his career, as the Director of Product Management at SecuraCom, Mr. Patel played a crucial role in launching identity management products tailored for the Internet of Things (IoT) and DevOps markets. His entrepreneurial spirit and strategic acumen were highlighted by his success in achieving $1 million ARR within just 12 months of product launch. Moreover, he demonstrated his leadership capability by building and managing both product management (PM) and product marketing management (PMM) teams, which were essential for driving innovative product development.

Throughout his career, Mr. Patel has consistently demonstrated leadership and innovation, leveraging his extensive expertise to extend the horizons of product management and cybersecurity solutions. His career trajectory reflects a consistent commitment to excellence and a profound impact on the cybersecurity landscape. Mr. Patel's extensive experience, proven track record of success in scaling products and teams, and his ability to drive innovation in cybersecurity make him an invaluable asset to any organization. His leadership, strategic vision, and technical expertise have consistently delivered significant results, and his contributions to the field of cybersecurity continue to make a profound impact.

In brief, Mr. Ashwin Patel is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management for cybersecurity. His extensive experience, proven track record of success in scaling products and teams, and his ability to drive innovation in cybersecurity make him an invaluable asset to any organization. His leadership, strategic vision, and technical expertise have consistently delivered significant results, and his contributions to the field of cybersecurity continue to make a profound impact.

If you require any further information or clarification, please feel free to contact me.

Very truly yours,

Bella Raj
CEO
Innovation Hub
[email contact here]
